Word Counter

Paste or type your text and instantly see word count, character count, sentence count, paragraph count and estimated reading time.

0

Paragraphs

1 min

Read Time

How to count words online

Paste or type your text into the box above. All counts — words, characters (with and without spaces), sentences and paragraphs — update in real time as you type. No button press needed. Works with text of any length.

What is estimated reading time?

Reading time is calculated based on an average adult reading speed of approximately 200 words per minute for general prose. The estimate is a useful guide for blog posts, articles and emails where you want to set reader expectations. A 1,000-word article typically takes around 5 minutes to read.

Who uses a word counter?

Students checking essay or assignment word limits. Writers tracking chapter or article length. Social media managers verifying post character counts before publishing. SEO professionals checking meta description or title tag lengths. Email marketers keeping subject lines within recommended limits. Journalists working to a specific word budget set by an editor.

What counts as a word?

A word is any sequence of characters separated by whitespace (spaces, tabs, line breaks). Numbers, hyphenated words and contractions each count as one word. Punctuation at the start or end of a word is excluded from the word itself but included in the character count.

Is my text stored?

No. Everything runs entirely in your browser. Your text is never sent to any server, logged or stored in any way. The counter works offline once the page is loaded.
